front.title: A half-buried plaque
front.description: A bronze plate poking out of the soil, somewhere in the Flats or near the Dread River. It's dented, a bit warped, with Maker-runes and esoteric diagrams etched into the surface. How the heck did it end up here?

list.description: The plate contains the workings of a spell, which you can learn but…
… you must first dig up & clean the plate.
… it'll take a few weeks of study.
… you risk harm to your voice, your hearing, and/or your neighbors as you practice.

back.title: Thunderous Bellow
back.description: When you channel the storm primeval and utter a thunderous bellow, take 1d6 damage (ignores armor) and roll +CON: on a 10+, everyone nearby (except you) must choose 2; on a 7-9, everyone nearby (except you) must choose 1.

move.name: When you channel the storm primeval and utter a thunderous bellow
move.description:
Take 1d6 damage (ignores armor) and roll +CON. On a 10+, everyone nearby (except you) must choose 2; on a 7-9, everyone nearby (except you) must choose 1:

  • Drop what they're carrying and cover their ears
  • Be deafened and disoriented for a few moments
  • Stagger a few steps away from you
